executionArgs.additionalInstruction: DATABASE_URL is now confirmed working — POST /api/threads just returned 200 with a real thread object. All DB-backed endpoints are unblocked. This is the final round of testing. Key fixes applied: login now validates via InsForge and returns 401 for bad creds; memory POST returns full record with id; workflows accept both prompt and steps[]; auth check returns user object; evaluateChainCondition returns false for unknown conditions; wrapToolContext sanitizes toolName attribute. Test all endpoints thoroughly including threads, messages, automations, workflows, memory CRUD, user integrations, and pending actions.
